channel.title: React.js Examples on Brian Efflandt Coding Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in React.js Examples on Brian Efflandt Coding Portfolio

item.title: Resume Analizer (Full Stack, AI)
item.description: AI‑Powered Resume Analyzer built with React, React Router, Puter, Puter.js, Tailwind CSS, Typescript, Zustand, and Vite. This is a streamlined platform where users can authenticate, upload resumes, and receive AI‑driven insights (including ATS scoring), job‑match analysis, and targeted improvement suggestions. This is all delivered through a clean, reusable UI.

item.title: ROBO FRIENDS (React)
item.description: React app that uses API’s to populate images and users alike. The search function allows narrowing down users (clear it to get back to origin). One API generates user images based on their name, the other populates the users themselves.

item.title: Tic Tac Toe (React)
item.description: React tic-tac-toe game that keeps a record of each player’s moves and highlights the winner’s marks once the game is complete.

item.title: Expense Tracker (React)
item.description: React application which allows a user to input expenses and then has an interface for viewing and tracking the expenses from year to year.
